jobs.title: SWD UP IAS PCS Free Coaching Admissions Online Form 2026
jobs.short_information: Social Welfare Department, SWD Uttar Pradesh has relased UP IAS PCS Free Coaching Admissions 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this UP IAS PCS Free Coaching Admissions 2025 Entrance Exam can Apply Online from 18/05/2026 to 18/06/2026. Read the notification for SWD Free Coaching Admission Test, eligibility, Coaching Details information, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information. jobs.title: Delhi University DU PG Admissions Online Form 2026
jobs.short_information: University of Delhi DU has released the online application for Post Graduate PG, BED, LLM and Other Various Coruses Admissions 2026 will start from 16 May 2026 and the last date to apply will be 07 June 2026.candidates should read the DU PG 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Course and University List, information and other types of information and then apply. University of Delhi (DU) Delhi University DU PG Admissions 2026 (CUET-PG) DU PG Admissions 2026 : Short Details of Notification

text_sections.section: How to Fill DU Admission 2026 PG Admission Online Form
text_sections.content: Delhi University has started online application for admission to Master Degree Courses PG Programmes based on CUET(PG)-2026 Examination PG Programmes based on CUET (PG)-2026 Examination . Any candidate who wants to apply should first complete the advertisement and then apply only after that. | Delhi University Admission online form is available from 16 May 2026 and the last date is 07 Jun 2026. between these two dates, you can fill the online application form. | Kindly Check and College the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Admission Entrance Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. | Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.

jobs.title: ABVMU UP CAHET Entrance Test Online Form 2026
jobs.short_information: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh has released the UP Common Allied Healthcare Entrance Test CAHET Notification 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 02/05/2026 to 05/06/2026.candidates should read the CAHET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the Common Allied Healthcare Entrance Test CAHET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, GNM Nursing Courses, information and other types of information and then apply.
